Project № 003 · Architectural Doc Series
Runtime 00:30.00 · Aspect 9:16 · Pacing 2.5 w/s
10× Workflow / v3.0
New York · 1959

Wright
at the Guggenheim A 30-second cinematic dossier on Frank Lloyd Wright's spiraling masterwork on Fifth Avenue — its temple-of-the-spirit thesis, its ramp that defied a city of right angles, and the gallery that became its own greatest work.

Stage 01 — Narrative Anchor & Character Research
Architect & Age
Frank Lloyd Wright
91 — at completion, posthumous, 1959
Persona
Warm, sage, mischievously certain. A grandfatherly prairie philosopher.
Master Mood
Reverent, defiant, organic. Quiet triumph.
Wardrobe — Locked HEX
#3D3328
tweed suit
#F4EFE6
cream shirt
#7A2E1F
oxblood tie
#1A1815
porkpie hat
#8B6F47
walking cane
Nationality / Voice
91-year-old American man. Slow, deliberate Midwestern cadence.
Anchor Phrase (Shot 01)
"Form and function are one."
“
Singular Thesis
A museum should not be a box of corridors — it should be one continuous space, a spiral temple where art and visitor ascend together. The crisis: every critic in New York insisted you cannot hang paintings on a curved, tilted wall.

Start Frame — Nano Banana 2
Wide, perfectly framed iconic perspective of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, low-angle ground view from Fifth Avenue showing the full white spiraling rotunda against Manhattan sky. Frank Lloyd Wright, 91, wearing #3D3328 tweed suit, #F4EFE6 cream shirt, #7A2E1F oxblood tie, #1A1815 porkpie hat, and holding a #8B6F47 walking cane, stands in the foreground, looking at the camera with a warm, certain smile. Pale golden hour light. --ar 9:16
▶ Kling 3 · Video Prompt · 5s
Motion: Slow dolly push-in past Wright as he gestures with the cane toward the spiraling facade of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum rising behind him. Camera holds his shoulder, lets the building reveal itself. Voice · 91 · American · Reverent, defiant On-Camera: "Form and function are one. So I drew them a spiral." SFX: — (clean, let voice land)
026 sec · vision
The Vision — Crisis of the Curved Wall
▸ Option C — Contextual Blueprint (chosen)
▸ Start Frame · Locked 9:16 · interior · 3000k
Reference Images · Blueprint Desk · Model Reference
01
Clear spiral profile + glass dome geometry
gives Nano Banana 2 accurate rotunda proportions for the physical model end frame
CC · open on Wikimedia Commons ↗

Oculus skylight close-up — glass dome pattern
reference for the dome detail on top of the physical model
CC BY-SA 3.0 · open on Wikimedia Commons ↗
Start Frame — Nano Banana 2
Top-down close-up of an archival 1943 blueprint and section drawing of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum spiral rotunda on a drafting desk, Wright's hand-lettered notations visible. Workplace interior, 3000k warm key light, blue fill light. --ar 9:16
▸ End Frame · Locked 9:16 · trained w/ start ref
End Frame — Nano Banana 2
Same drafting desk, same workplace interior. A highly detailed physical scale model of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum — white spiraling rotunda, accurate proportions — emerges upward from the surface of the blueprint, as if the paper has birthed the building. Model sits atop the drawing, blueprint lines visible beneath its base. 3000k warm key light catches the curves of the rotunda; blue fill light grazes the back of the model. Wright's pencil and drafting tools rest beside it. Trained with start frame as ref. --ar 9:16
▶ Kling 3 · Video Prompt · 6s
Motion: Camera holds steady on the desk. Blueprint ink lines lift off the page and assemble vertically — the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum model rising and materializing out of the drawing itself, ramp by ramp. A 16-year drawing made physical. Voice · 91 · American · Reverent, defiant Voiceover: "They said you cannot hang a painting on a curve. I said: then build the curve." SFX: Soft paper-through cinematic whoosh as blueprint dissolves into the model.

Start Frame — Nano Banana 2
Low-angle interior shot from the ground floor of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum rotunda, looking straight up the spiraling ramp toward the domed glass oculus. Frank Lloyd Wright, 91, in #3D3328 tweed suit, #F4EFE6 cream shirt, #7A2E1F oxblood tie, #1A1815 porkpie hat, stands on the ground floor with his cane, looking up. 3000k warm key light, blue fill light from the oculus, interior lights on for moody accents on the white ramp. --ar 9:16
▶ Kling 3 · Video Prompt · 6s
Motion: Camera rises slowly towards the skylight. Skylight becomes brighter as camera rises. Voice · 91 · American · Reverent, defiant Voiceover: "No corridors. No corners. One ramp — a quarter mile of art unfurled by gravity." SFX: — (clean)

Start Frame — Nano Banana 2
Medium-wide three-quarter shot along the spiraling gallery ramp of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, visitors of varied ages walking, pausing, leaning in toward paintings tilted on the curved white walls. Frank Lloyd Wright, 91, in #3D3328 tweed suit, #F4EFE6 cream shirt, #7A2E1F oxblood tie, #1A1815 porkpie hat, with cane, stands at the rail watching them. 3000k warm key light, blue fill from the oculus, interior lights on. --ar 9:16
▶ Kling 3 · Video Prompt · 6s
Motion: Slow truck movement to the right. Frank looks at the camera and speaks directly. Voice · 91 · American · Reverent, defiant On-Camera: "You don't visit this museum. You climb it. The building does the walking with you." SFX: — (clean)

Start Frame — Nano Banana 2
Frank Lloyd Wright, 91, in #3D3328 tweed suit, #F4EFE6 cream shirt, #7A2E1F oxblood tie, #1A1815 porkpie hat, with #8B6F47 walking cane, standing on the sidewalk of Fifth Avenue beside the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, looking up at the curving facade. Pale golden hour light. --ar 9:16
▶ Kling 3 · Video Prompt · 7s
Motion: Slow vertical crane-up, ascending the central void of the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, glass oculus blooming brighter as we rise. Fade to black. Voice · 91 · American · Reverent, defiant Voiceover: "They built a city of right angles. I left them one perfect spiral to argue with." SFX: Distant Fifth Avenue ambience fading under a low, sustained cello note.
Anti-Drift Anchor"Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum" stated in every Nano Banana 2 prompt. No "the museum," no "the building."
Lighting PolicyInterior: 3000k key + blue fill, interior lights on. Exterior: pale golden hour. Locked across all five shots.
Pacing Audit10 + 15 + 15 + 15 + 16 = 71 words across 30s. Target ~75. All shots clear their word caps.
Mood LockReverent, defiant, organic — applied identically to every voice prompt. No tonal drift between clips.
